description: Identify the active Service Contract that expires the soonest. Create a renewal Opportunity for this contract in the Opportunities (Deals) module with the name 'Renewal: [Contract Subject]', linked to the contract's Organization, an amount of 25000, an expected close date 14 days before the contract's end date, and the sales stage 'Needs Analysis'. Add a comment to the original Service Contract with the text 'Renewal opportunity created'.
